summary: Message summary repository implementation for storing and retrieving message summaries
side_effects: Database operations (INSERT with ON CONFLICT, SELECT with JOINs)
notes: Implements MessageSummaryRepository interface. Uses ON CONFLICT clause to upsert summaries (automatic update if message_id exists). GetUnsummarizedMessages and GetUnsummarizedMessagesByChannels perform LEFT JOINs with messages table to find unsummarized messages. Includes dynamic SQL construction with string.Join for channel ID filtering.
